items.note: The mug, cold-coffee notification, and after-drinking sequence are preserved.
All four source-text propositions and both style targets are preserved.
The established compound premise is preserved with grouped anchors and invention is limited to one harmless useless milestone.
Cancellation and cause are preserved while identity, medical detail, and unsuitable style are prohibited.
Refresh, dashboard unavailability, three-minute duration, two-sentence format, and no-style boundary are preserved.
